title: Transition the document from a business plan at Lilongwe Gofclub to a center somewhere in Lilongwe (town)
close_reason: Removed LGC-specific request letter and genericized references throughout: Lilongwe Golf Club / LGC → Lilongwe / premises in Lilongwe; LGC members → Lilongwe residents. Kept Benjamin's golf physiotherapy credentials (clinical skill, not venue-bound). Verified by quarto render.

title: Translation from German to english
close_reason: Translated Businessplan.qmd from German to English; preserved YAML frontmatter, code blocks (Mermaid, R), URLs, image references, section anchor IDs, and table structure.

title: Transition from Serious Health Game for only the German compulsary health insurance market to the global market
description: Please transition the whole `Businessplan.qmd` towards a global approach. The Serious Health Games - modules like 'BenBen - Back School' are contained games, the Serious Ben Entertainment platform on `https://www.seriousbenentertainment.org`. Move the Paragraph 20 - Primärprävention services towards an example for domestic adaptation.\
design: Keep as much content as possible, on adapt.
acceptance_criteria: Phelire is mentioned as creative force (Social Worker, Artist, Healer)
close_reason: Transitioned Businessplan.qmd to a global English-speaking market focus. Reframed §20 SGB V primary prevention as one domestic-adaptation example (Germany) rather than the core business model. Renamed flagship from 'BenBox RS' to 'BenBen - Back School' as a self-contained Serious Health Game module. Integrated Phelire Chisi throughout as co-founder and creative force (Social Worker, Artist, Healer) with dedicated qualifications and experience sections. HTML rendered successfully.
